ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Retrieves high-value Opportunities from Salesforce so an Agentforce agent can answer questions about large deals.
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: OpportunityMcpService
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: 3.0.0 info: title: OpportunityMcpService description: Retrieves high-value Opportunities from Salesforce so an Agentforce agent can answer questions about large deals. version: '1.0.0' servers: - url: /services/aura-controllers/custom paths: /getHighValueOpportunities: post: operationId: getHighValueOpportunities summary: Get high-value opportunities description: Retrieves all Opportunities whose Amount is greater than a minimum value (defaults to 50000), ordered from the largest deal to the smallest. Results respect the running user sharing and field-level security. x-sfdc: agent: action: publishAsAgentAction: true requestBody: required: true content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: minimumAmount: title: Minimum Amount description: Exclusive lower bound on Opportunity Amount. Defaults to 50000 when omitted. type: number x-sfdc: agent: action: isDisplayable: true isUserInput: true responses: '200': description: A list of high-value opportunities, largest Amount first. content: application/json: schema: type: array items: $ref: '#/components/schemas/HighValueOpportunity' components: schemas: HighValueOpportunity: type: object properties: opportunityId: type: string description: The Opportunity record Id. name: type: string description: The Opportunity name. amount: type: number description: The Opportunity Amount in the org default currency. stageName: type: string description: The current sales stage. closeDate: type: string format: date description: The expected close date. accountName: type: string description: The related Account name, if any.
